dishes: Classic Pork Minced and Egg Cheong Fun
Diced Chicken with Pickled Vegetables with Rice
reviews: There seems to have been some mention on social media recently on a stall serving up Cantonese-style Stone Mill Cheong Fun at Redhill Food Centre... The menu revolves around their Cantonese Stone Mill Cheong Fun, offering patrons with different variants of the dish that comes with various filling options...
stalls.stall_name: 正其广式石磨肠粉 Cantonese Stone Mill Cheong Fun (Redhill Food Centre)

reviews: Steamed Chicken (half) Rice Chicken Liver x 3 Chicken Gizzards x 3... Special Combi Steam Chicken + Roasted Chicken + Chicken Cutlet + Rice Such huge serving!
“Three Combination” set, which allows you to choose three types of meat.
stalls.stall_name: SP3 Chicken Rice (Redhill Lane Block 85 Food Centre)

reviews: Interesting stall. Their primary business is hotpot, but they use the same ingredients to whip up noodles... The star though was the wicked noodle seasoning.
stalls.stall_name: Faith & Aaron Mini Hotpot (Redhill Lane Block 85 Food Centre)

reviews: Their coffee is pretty well liked... particularly fragrant. Worth a try, plus their opening hours are friendly.
While the salty butter is nice, the bread is too thick and is way too dry to eat.
stalls.stall_name: Uncle Mak Cafe (Redhill Lane Block 85 Food Centre)

reviews: No matter how full I am, must still buy Chicken wings from Yan Fried Bee Hoon. Tasty, crispy outside while inside juicy.
Bee Hoon ($0.60) can be mixed with different fried food... chicken wings was quite delicious and savoury.
stalls.stall_name: Yan Fried Bee Hoon (Redhill Lane Block 85 Food Centre)

reviews: Michelin Bib Gourmand... pretty popular for its Fried Carrot Cakes available in both white or black version.
The black carrot cake was sweet, savoury and spicy with a little bit of charred taste.
stalls.stall_name: Fu Ming Cooked Food (Redhill Lane Block 85 Food Centre)

reviews: Textbook. Every component from the rice to the tender ckn, is very simple and well executed.
The sio bak is the highlight here, it's got a thin hard crisp and it's very fatty so quite flavourful.
stalls.stall_name: Ru Ji Kitchen 如记小厨 (Rehill Lane)

reviews: The immediate difference here is the addition of bean sprouts, which lend a satisfying crunch... The white is more popular, with a smoky savoury sweet salty eggy flavour.
stalls.stall_name: Delicious Fried Carrot Cake (Redhill Lane Block 85 Food Centre)
